text.title: Privacy-Compliant Analytics Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when in doubt about which variant to apply.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all Applies-If preconditions hold and no Skip-If trigger fires?

conclusion.verdict: do not run this methodology; document skip rationale
switch CMP to default-deny + gate all non-essential tags
migrate Google tags to Consent Mode v2 + all four signals
implement GPC header detection + CCPA opt-out routing
configure IP truncation pre-storage in all analytics tools
build per-release tag audit + network-tab proofs

text.example: preconditions=true → readiness gates evaluated → all_checks_pass==true → conclusion ref=tag-audit-log-per-release
